content: TASK-064 checkpoint done: Expanded playground/static demo editor layout to fill the browser rendering area. index.html and examples/demo.html now use html/body 100% height, body grid rows for header + remaining workspace, hidden page overflow, minmax(0,1fr) main content, full-height editor/diagram panes, and diagnostics as a bottom overlay so the textarea reaches the viewport bottom. Verification: browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ measured textareaBottomGap=0, panelBottomGap=0, mainBottomGap=0 with no document scroll; npm run build passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is broader layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
